LANGUAGE_SELECT.prompt: Ration Saathi mein aapka swagat hai. Hindi ke liye 1 dabayein. Rajasthani ke liye 2 dabayein. CSC sahayak ke liye 0 dabayein.
LANGUAGE_SELECT.timeout: Koi jawab nahi mila. Kripya 1 ya 2 dabayein.

RATION_CARD_INPUT.prompt: Apna ration card number dabayein, phir star dabayein.
RATION_CARD_INPUT.timeout: Card number nahi mila. Dobara koshish karein.
RATION_CARD_INPUT.invalid: Galat number. Sirf angrezi ke numbers dabayein.

ENTITLEMENT_READ.prompt_template: Namaste {head_name} ji. Is mahine {month} mein, aapko {wheat_kg} kilo gehu aur {rice_kg} kilo chawal milna chahiye. Kya aapko poora anaaj mila? Haan ke liye 1, kam mila toh 2 dabayein.

COMPLAINT_TYPE.prompt: Kaunsi cheez kam mili? Gehu ke liye 1, chawal ke liye 2, dono ke liye 3 dabayein.

QUANTITY_INPUT.prompt_template: Aapko {expected_kg} kilo milna chahiye tha. Kitna mila? Kilo mein number dabayein phir star.

CASE_CREATED.prompt_template: Aapki fariyaad darj ho gayi. Case number hai {case_number}. Yeh number apne paas rakhein. SMS bhi aayega. Dhanyavaad.

CARD_NOT_FOUND.prompt: Yeh card number hamare system mein nahi mila. CSC kendra par jaayein ya 0 dabayein sahayak ke liye.

ASSISTED_REDIRECT.prompt: Aapko hamare CSC sahayak se milayenge. Kripya {csc_phone} par call karein ya nearest CSC kendra par jaayein.

CALL_COMPLETED.prompt: Ration Saathi mein call karne ke liye dhanyavaad. Jai Hind.
